summary: Full frontend-only smoke + functional test of Bon Ton Fitness site (Home with R3F dumbbell, /programs, /transformation, /careers, /contact). Home loads without R3F crashes or error overlay; r3f-shim logs 23 keys applied to 6 prototypes; 3D canvas visible; Lenis smooth scroll works; horizontal ClassesRail pin-scroll transforms correctly; testimonials carousel prev/next/dots work; membership plans & branch phones all correct; /transformation seed + upload + localStorage persistence + delete flow all work end-to-end; /programs shows 10 cards + 5 facilities; /careers shows 4 benefits + 4 roles with tel:7022888883; /contact form submits with success state and shows all 5 branch phones + FB/IG socials. No console errors on any page. Responsive at 768px with no horizontal overflow.
critical_code_review_comments: Transformation.jsx useEffect hydrating from localStorage always appends SEED after saved items via [...saved, ...SEED]. After a user adds + then reloads, user entries render before seed via re-order, but if user saves twice without reload the onSubmit sets items = [entry, ...items.filter(not seed), ...SEED] which is fine. However, if localStorage contains a seed-prefixed id (unlikely) it would duplicate. Low risk.
r3f-shim.js correctly patches THREE prototypes; console confirms '[r3f-shim] applied 23 keys to 6 prototypes'. Keep this shim in index.js import order before any R3F import.
Source-map warning for @mediapipe/tasks-vision is noise from a transitive dep; not a runtime issue.
seed_data_creation: Used two 1x1 PNG fixtures (/tmp/test_before.png, /tmp/test_after.png) to exercise Transformation upload flow; localStorage cleared before test and after delete.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 18 requested checks passed. Selectors to reuse: section-testimonials, testimonial-next/prev, testimonial-dot-{0..2}, testimonial-slide, section-classes-rail, transformations-grid, before-after-slider, input-name, input-caption, pick-before/pick-after (hidden file input inside label), submit-transformation, delete-{id}, page-programs, program-{0..9}, facility-{name}, contact-name/number/message/submit. localStorage key: bonton_transformations_v1. Horizontal rail transform confirmed via inline translate3d style changing from ~-256px to -3700px across pinned scroll range.
rca of the issue: No issues found; no RCA needed.
